header.purpose: Experiment 001 frozen candidate task pool (regression-prone enrichment). Canonical order is the SEED permutation, NOT the score.

scoring.name: regression_proneness_score
scoring.definition: 0.5 * (pct_rank(total_changed_lines) + pct_rank(n_PASS_TO_PASS)), mid-rank percentiles computed over the full qualifying all-repo set; higher = more regression-prone. This score is a REPORTED column only; the canonical pool order is the seeded permutation.
scoring.note: score/score_rank_all are computed on the all-repo qualifying set and carried unchanged into the django-only pool for comparability.

heavy_or_flaky_repos.matplotlib/matplotlib: C-extension + headless GUI backend build; heavy image
heavy_or_flaky_repos.sympy/sympy: pure-python but very large test suite (slow verifier)
heavy_or_flaky_repos.pytest-dev/pytest: self-hosting test runner; occasional env fragility
